title: Camera / Webcam Troubleshooting
description: Resolving laptop camera and webcam connection, permission, and driver issues.

steps.title: Close Conflicting Apps
steps.instruction: Close all apps that may be using the camera (Zoom, Teams, Google Meet, Slack, etc.). Only one app can access the camera at a time. Then reopen the app you need.

steps.title: Check Camera Privacy Settings
steps.instruction:
Windows: Settings → Privacy & Security → Camera → Ensure 'Camera access' is ON and your app is allowed.
Mac: System Settings → Privacy & Security → Camera → Enable the toggle for your app.

steps.title: Check Device Manager / Drivers
steps.instruction:
Windows: Open Device Manager → Expand 'Cameras' or 'Imaging Devices' → Right-click your camera → 'Update driver' or 'Enable device' if disabled.
Mac: Check System Report → Camera to confirm detection.

steps.title: Restart & Physical Check
steps.instruction: Restart your laptop. If using an external webcam, unplug and replug it into a different USB port. Ensure no physical camera shutter/cover is blocking the lens.

steps.title: Raise Support Ticket
steps.instruction: If the camera still doesn't work after all steps above, raise a support ticket with: your Asset/Laptop ID, app name, error details, and steps already tried.
